content:
offers a solemn greeting in passing,

and then slips into the kitchen, lost for a few moments as to what to do with the spilt milk.

Chris decides to make busy.

He realizes it is probably best to pour two cocktails as we swallow the ever-widening social pill. Looking everywhere but where the appropriate supplies would or should be; cabinets bang open and closed.

Anthony unpacks the bags he hauled in with hurried disposition. Both lost in different miasmas; a way to fuse those forces takes time to arrive…

Anthony inquires as to what Chris was working on when he interrupted him.

Chris troubles himself translating the thoughts to words.

The moment of excitement felt upon conception glitters in his eye for another brief moment:

the words lost. Flustered, he storms out from under the weight of those ideas

and then into the oppression of hosting.

On Chris’ voyage back towards the engagement, he hands off one of the glasses to Anthony,
context: From document: Up The Hill Backwards — chunk 2 (chunk 2/5)
